commit.message:
Redesign Daily Challenge section with animated DC card and streak tracker

Daily Challenge Card:
- Animated gold shimmer border sweeping left-to-right (CSS keyframe)
- Gold radial glow behind card title
- ★ DAILY CHALLENGE gold badge + 2× POINTS orange badge header
- Movie title in Bebas Neue, italic quote, actor + difficulty badge
- Live HH:MM:SS countdown "New challenge in" to UTC midnight
- "Open Scene →" gold button wired to openModal()
- Green completion overlay animates in after daily submit or on page load
  when profile shows daily_done_today=true

Streak Card (right of DC card on desktop, stacked on mobile):
- 🔥 fire emoji with CSS flicker animation (scale + skewX + brightness)
- Large orange streak number in Bebas Neue
- 7-day dot row: each column shows day abbreviation + dot state
    empty = not completed, ✔ done (orange), ★ today (pulsing orange ring)
- Milestone message adapts to streak count and whether today is done

Layout: CSS grid 1fr/240px on desktop, single column on mobile

JS:
- renderDailyCard(), renderStreakCard(), streakMessage(), showDailyComplete()
- loadStreakCard() fetches /api/profile on boot/login/register
- showPointsEarned() calls showDailyComplete()+renderStreakCard() on daily submit
- startDailyCountdown() reloads both daily + streak at midnight

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: mirror-app
repository.description: English learning app through movie scenes

commit.message:
Add Daily Challenge feature with streak tracking

Backend:
- get_daily_scene_id(): MD5 hash of UTC date string → deterministic scene for all users
- GET /api/daily: returns scene, date, bonus_multiplier, secs_until_reset
- DB migration: users.streak INTEGER, users.last_daily TEXT
- POST /api/submit: detects daily scene, awards 2× points, updates streak
  (streak increments if last_daily = yesterday, resets to 1 otherwise)
  returns is_daily, daily_bonus, daily_already_done, streak
- GET /api/leaderboard: includes streak per user row
- GET /api/profile: includes streak, daily_done_today, daily_scene_id

Frontend:
- Daily bar above scene grid: scene name + live HH:MM:SS countdown to UTC midnight
- Countdown auto-reloads daily data when it hits 00:00:00
- Gold "DAILY CHALLENGE" badge on the matching scene card
- "★ Daily · 2× pts" pill in recording modal header
- Points panel shows daily bonus amount + 🔥 N-day streak on completion
- Leaderboard: 🔥N streak badge next to username
- My Progress: streak shown in division card

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace Web Audio waveform with 48-bar CSS-animated gold visualizer

- 48 gold bars (up from 30 red) using var(--gold) colour
- @keyframes wave-dance: flat (3px) → peak height → flat, infinite loop
- Each bar gets randomised CSS custom properties via JS:
    --wh  peak height 20–48px, arched higher at centre
    --wd  duration 0.45–1.1s
    --wdl negative delay -1–0s so bars are staggered at start
- Animation runs only when .waveform-wrap.on is present (during recording)
- Bars are invisible/flat when idle — no layout shift
- startWaveform() no longer needs stream arg; removed Web Audio draw loop

commit.message:
Fix push subscription failing on repeat clicks

subscribeToPush was always calling pushManager.subscribe() without
checking for an existing subscription first. On subsequent clicks the
browser would conflict on the existing subscription causing a silent
failure. Now reuses the existing subscription via getSubscription()
if one already exists, matching the pattern in lib/pushService.js.

commit.message:
fix: yield event loop before blocking dialog so flat-lay fetch dispatches

Safari/WebKit suspends pending fetch requests when window.confirm() blocks
the thread. Added a 50ms setTimeout yield after fire-and-forget calls and
before the confirmation dialog in both add-item and bulk-upload flows.

commit.message:
feat: knowledge base — 7 nuovi pattern di guasto (FP-17 → FP-23)

Aggiunti 7 pattern diagnostici reali al knowledge base (da 16 a 23):
- FP-17: cortocircuito franco — MT scatta istantaneamente
- FP-18: alimentatore switching instabile — sovraccarico/condensatori
- FP-19: PLC in STOP/FAULT — watchdog, alimentazione, moduli I/O
- FP-20: condensa nel quadro — pressacavi, guarnizioni, anticondensa
- FP-21: motore monofase non si avvia — condensatore, avvolgimenti
- FP-22: RCD tipo errato per carichi elettronici/inverter/wallbox
- FP-23: relè 24VDC non si eccita — bobina, segnale, alimentazione

Ogni pattern include: likely_causes, confidence_logic, checks (6 passi),
common_mistakes, example_case reale.

commit.message:
Fix crash: remove in-flight SwiftData object deletion

Deleting Category/StorageLocation rows from initializeDefaultData() while
@Query holds live references to those objects causes a fatal SwiftData crash:
"This model instance was invalidated because its backing data could no longer
be found in the store."

Remove deduplicateCategories() / deduplicateLocations() entirely. Duplicate
rows from the previous seeding race are already hidden from the UI by the
uniqueCategories / uniqueLocations computed properties, and the fetchCount
guard prevents any new duplicates from being inserted going forward.

feat: add MOTO (phone order) payment support (#30)

* feat: add MOTO plugin setting and pass to JS frontend

* feat: add MOTO parameter to create_payment_intent

* feat: pass MOTO flag through AjaxHandler to StripeTerminalService

* feat: add MOTO toggle to AJAX payment frontend

* feat: add MOTO support to REST API create-payment-intent endpoint

* feat: add MOTO toggle to React/terminal-js frontend

* feat: detect MOTO payments in webhook handlers and save metadata

* fix: remove invalid moto config from collectPaymentMethod call

MOTO for JS SDK is handled server-side via payment_method_types, not
as a client-side collectPaymentMethod option. The TypeScript types
correctly reject the invalid property.

* fix: address review feedback from CodeRabbit

- Persist _stripe_terminal_moto metadata by moving $order->save() after
  meta update in AjaxHandler.php
- Clear stale _stripe_terminal_moto on non-MOTO webhook updates in
  API.php and StripeTerminalService.php (4 locations)
- Add stripe_s710 to MOTO_COMPATIBLE_DEVICES in payment-frontend source
  and terminal-ui Payment.tsx
- Wire enableMoto prop through stwcConfig → App → Payment in terminal-ui
- Add useEffect to reset isMoto state when MOTO toggle becomes hidden
- Rebuild assets/js/payment.js from updated source

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- AjaxHandler: create_payment_intent checks is_moto_enabled() before
  accepting MOTO flag from request
- AjaxHandler: retry_payment reads MOTO state from order meta instead
  of trusting $_POST input, and validates against gateway setting
- API: create_payment_intent checks enable_moto setting before
  switching to card-not-present payment method types

- useCollectPayment: invalidate cached PaymentIntent when MOTO toggle
  changes to prevent reusing an intent with wrong payment_method_types
- stwcConfig: replace !! coercion with ?? for enableMoto since backend
  already provides a boolean

commit.message:
Fix MPO tensor dimension: change Tensor4D to Tensor5D

The Heisenberg MPO requires 5 dimensions: [site][left_bond][phys_in][phys_out][right_bond],
but was incorrectly declared as Tensor4D. This caused compilation errors when accessing
mpo[site][a][i][j][b].

Changes:
- Added Tensor5D type alias to dmrg_types.hpp
- Updated build_heisenberg_mpo() signature to return Tensor5D<Complex>
- Fixed comments to clarify the 5D structure

This resolves all "no match for operator[]" compilation errors.

commit.message:
fix(frontend): use API as single source for WIP, remove localStorage merge

The frontend was double-counting WIP jobs by merging:
- dviJobs from /api/dvi/data (3,914 jobs)
- wipJobs from localStorage (stale data ~1,015 jobs)

Since deduplication by invoice failed (format mismatch),
total showed ~4,929 instead of 3,914.

Fix: Use dviJobs from API as single source of truth.
The mergedJobs now just filters out CANCELED/SHIPPED from dviJobs.

test: add golden-file similarity check to integration test

Add test_mlx_backend_transcript_matches_golden:
- Joins all segment texts, strips RTL embedding marks, normalises
  whitespace, then compares against a stored golden reference using
  difflib.SequenceMatcher (threshold 0.95)
- First run writes fixtures/chunk_000_transcript.txt and skips;
  subsequent runs validate against it
- Same model + same audio yields 100% similarity (deterministic)
- Delete the fixture to regenerate after an intentional model update

commit.message:
Add AFP watermark injection with PNG/JPEG/TIFF and reference AFP support

Watermark tool embeds image watermarks into AFP files by injecting Object
Container resources (BOC/OCD/EOC) and IOB references per page.

Supported formats:
- PNG (OID 0x41), JPEG (OID 0x17), TIFF (OID 0x0E): raw bytes in BOC
- AFP reference mode: verbatim copy from known-good reference file
- PGD-based centering: reads page dimensions, positions at 10% margins

Key fixes during development:
- BDE must have 52-byte triplets (Object Classification + OID)
- Source resource groups preserved before BDT (fixes AEPDuplex duplex)
- BNG/ENG not stripped (needed for duplex page grouping)
- Original BDT preserved (not synthesized)
- IOB diff scans all pages (not just first) for overlay detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(ast): add v0.19 Foundation - Two-Phase IR Architecture

Implement compiler-grade AST infrastructure inspired by rustc:

## Source Infrastructure
- Span tracking (line:col) using marked_yaml
- FileId(u32) for interned file identifiers
- SourceRegistry for multi-file support with Span::display()

## Two-Phase IR
- raw::Workflow: Parsed YAML with Spanned<T> wrappers
- analyzed::Workflow: Validated IR with resolved references
- TaskId(u32), FlowDefId, McpServerId for O(1) comparison

## Analyzer
- Transforms raw → analyzed with full validation
- Cycle detection (DFS-based)
- Error collection (all errors in single pass)
- Suggestion engine using Jaro-Winkler (strsim)
- Error codes E001-E009 with source locations

## Documentation
- Language Reference document (docs/reference/)
- Implementation plan with 8 phases

Dependencies: marked_yaml 0.8, strsim 0.11, indexmap 2.9

Tests: 382 AST tests passing (25 analyzer, 18 raw, 13 analyzed)
